title: After I Let The Small And Cute Intellectual Senior Of The Literature Club Sit On My Lap, She Started Sitting There Every Day
description:
One day, the chairs in the Literature Club were lent out to other clubs, leaving only a single chair behind.
Shou and Yuzu began a lighthearted argument, each trying to yield the remaining seat to the other.
Each wanted the other to sit more than themselves. Because of their mutual kindness, neither would back down, resulting in a stalemate—until finally, Yuzu’s opinion won out, and Shou ended up sitting in the chair alone.
Shou felt guilty being the only one sitting, but right then, he had a flash of inspiration.

“Since I'm the one sitting in the chair, if I become the chair and let Yuzu-senpai sit on my lap… wouldn't that work?”

…Or so he thought.
author: Kanro Ame
